modmenu.summaryTranslation.locator_lodes: Adds Lodestones to the Player Locator Bar.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.locator_l:
Adds Lodestones to the Player Locator Bar.

Lodestone Compasses in your Inventory (including in Bundles) add Waypoints to your Locator Bar.
configs.locator_lodestones.tab_display.t: Whether holding the tab button forces the locator bar to appear, is required for it to appear, or has no effect (default)
configs.locator_lodestones.tab_shows_nam: Whether holding the tab button makes the names of compass waypoints appear
configs.locator_lodestones.show_recovery: Whether Recovery Compasses also create waypoints
configs.locator_lodestones.show_bundled_: Whether compasses in Bundles also appear
configs.locator_lodestones.show_in_spect: Whether compass waypoints still appear in Spectator Mode
configs.locator_lodestones.color_customi: Whether the color of waypoints can be changed by putting a hex code in the item name
configs.locator_lodestones.lodestone_col: The default color for Lodestone Compass waypoints. Can be set to 'random' to randomize it
configs.locator_lodestones.recovery_colo: The default color for Recovery Compass waypoints. Can be set to 'random' to randomize it
